rag_rules: Repair invalid AGREE clauses by removing or correcting references to non-typed or invisible identifiers
Ensure implementation-level assignments target only visible outputs or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Fix type errors by resolving the root unresolved identifier before modifying contract logic
Limit implementation annexes to assignments; avoid guarantees in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assign output = expression;' only when output is a visible port or declared variable
Component type contracts must reference only features visible at the type level
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not add new architecture elements to fix type errors—remove or correct invalid clauses instead
